transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Did you schedule a résumé review with Career Services?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. I want feedback before I apply for summer internships.

transcript.question_intro: Why did the woman schedule the résumé review?

questions.prompt: Why did the woman schedule the résumé review?

choices.text: To improve her résumé before applying for internships.

questions.explanation: She wants feedback before applying for summer internships.
questions.evidence: I want feedback before I apply for summer internships.
